8928308280fffff.explanation: Zone 8928308280fffff on Subedar Chatram Road, Gandhi Nagar (Upparpet PS, pincode 560009) is the single highest-impact illegal parking zone in Bengaluru, scoring 88.7 out of 100 on the Congestion Impact Index — placing it in the CRITICAL band. This zone recorded 5,838 parking violations between November 2023 and April 2024, the highest in the city. The dominant violation is WRONG PARKING along Subedar Chatram Road, a primary arterial that feeds traffic toward Kempegowda Bus Station and the Majestic metro interchange. With two bus stops within 200 metres — including a busy KSRTC feeder stop — illegal parking in this zone directly blocks bus bay access and forces passengers to board in live traffic lanes, compounding pedestrian conflict. The zone is estimated to block 34.2 lane-hours per day. MapMyIndia real-time data shows a travel time ratio of 1.08x here — a relatively mild slowdown for the highest violation count in the city, a clear illustration that violation density overstates this wide corridor's actual flow impact. Our self-validating agent calibrates the raw 88.7 score down to 72.4 on exactly this basis. Enforcement recommendation: deploy one patrol team to this zone between 08:00 and 11:00 IST, focused on the north carriageway of Subedar Chatram Road adjacent to the bus stops. This corridor accounts for over 11% of all city violations by pincode (560009).

892830828ffffff.explanation: Zone 892830828ffffff at BGS Flyover, City Market Circle (City Market PS, pincode 560002) scores 85.3/100 on the Congestion Impact Index — CRITICAL band. MapMyIndia real-time data shows a travel time ratio of 1.31x on this corridor — a moderate slowdown despite the very high violation count, and a textbook example of why violation density and congestion impact are not the same map. The zone recorded 5,280 violations dominated by NO PARKING offences at City Market Circle, where commercial loading activity, auto-rickshaw queuing, and pedestrian overflow from KR Market converge on a two-lane approach road. Three bus stops are located within 60 metres, making this an acute bus bay obstruction zone. Estimated lane-hours blocked: 31.5 per day. The City Market junction (BTP082 - KR Market Junction) handles one of the city's highest pedestrian-vehicle conflict volumes. Enforcement recommendation: this zone remains a high patrol priority on violation volume, but Mappls live data (1.31x) tempers the congestion claim — our self-validating agent calibrates the raw 85.3 score down to 72.1 to reflect the road's real measured performance. Patrol focus: NO PARKING zone enforcement at the KR Market Circle approach between 08:30 and 12:00 IST.

892830829ffffff.explanation: Zone 892830829ffffff on New Horizon College Road, Kadubisanahalli (HAL Old Airport PS, pincode 560103) scores 79.1/100 — CRITICAL band. This zone recorded 5,166 violations with PARKING IN A MAIN ROAD as the dominant offence type. The road serves as the primary access route to HAL Old Airport area, Kadubisanahalli tech corridor, and several large IT campuses. Illegal main-road parking on this stretch effectively reduces a two-lane carriageway to a single moving lane, creating persistent peak-hour queues. Three bus stops are clustered within 185 metres — including BMTC route stops for the Electronic City and Whitefield IT corridors — indicating heavy commuter footfall. MapMyIndia ETA data shows a 1.26x travel time ratio, reflecting the zone's distance from the city centre compounding congestion from parking obstruction. Estimated 28.8 lane-hours blocked per day. This zone is a repeat-offender hotspot: the HAL Old Airport PS is the 4th highest violation-recording station in the city (20,819 records). Enforcement recommendation: deploy one patrol unit during the 08:00–10:00 morning IT commute window, focusing on PARKING IN A MAIN ROAD violations at the New Horizon College Road junction approach.

89283082affffff.explanation: Zone 89283082affffff on Kamaraj Road, Sivanchetti Gardens (Shivajinagar PS, pincode 560042) scores 76.4/100 — CRITICAL band. This zone sits at the intersection approach to Safina Plaza Junction (BTP051), the single highest-volume junction in the dataset with 15,449 recorded violations — 5.2% of all city violations at one junction. The dominant violation is PARKING NEAR ROAD CROSSING, with 4,842 recorded events. Vehicles parked within the road crossing approach zone obstruct turning movements and reduce the green-time utilisation of Kamaraj Road's traffic signals, directly degrading intersection throughput. Three bus stops are within 80 metres (Dickenson Road Bus Stop at 80m), making bus-bay obstruction a secondary impact. MapMyIndia confirms a 1.70x travel time ratio — the highest measured among our top zones — consistent with genuine intersection disruption at this junction. Estimated 26.1 lane-hours blocked daily. Shivajinagar PS is the 2nd highest violation-recording station citywide (28,044 records). Enforcement recommendation: target PARKING NEAR ROAD CROSSING enforcement at Safina Plaza Junction approach lanes between 08:00 and 11:00 IST. Even small reductions here have outsized impact given the junction's traffic volume rank.

89283082bffffff.explanation: Zone 89283082bffffff on BB Naidu Road, Gandhi Nagar (Upparpet PS, pincode 560009) scores 72.8/100 — SEVERE band. This zone recorded 4,408 WRONG PARKING violations in the Gandhi Nagar commercial district, one of the highest-density retail and wholesale markets in central Bengaluru. BB Naidu Road is a secondary collector road that feeds traffic from Kempegowda Road (the primary arterial) into the Gandhi Nagar market interior. Illegal parking on this road creates a full lane obstruction on what is effectively a single-lane service road during peak commercial hours. Gandhi Nagar Bus Stop is 266 metres away, with two additional stops within 320 metres, indicating active pedestrian-transit crossover at this node. MapMyIndia shows a 1.05x travel time ratio — relatively low despite high violation counts, suggesting BB Naidu Road's narrowness means violations are so chronic that they are priced into normal travel times (the road is never free-flowing). Estimated 23.7 lane-hours blocked per day. This is Upparpet PS's second-highest sub-zone (pincode 560009 accounts for 11.1% of all city violations). Enforcement recommendation: WRONG PARKING enforcement at BB Naidu Road between 09:00 and 12:00 IST, targeting loading-zone violations from wholesale delivery vehicles which are the primary large-vehicle obstruction source in this market zone.

892830833ffffff.explanation: Zone 892830833ffffff in Shivajinagar experiences MODERATE congestion with a score of 43.2/100. The primary issue is 'WRONG PARKING', accounting for 2963 violations in the last 30 days and leading to an estimated 11.4 lane-hours blocked daily, with lane blockage contributing 60% and intersection impact 30% to this congestion. The peak violation hour is 9:00 IST, coinciding with morning peak traffic, and MapMyIndia data further validates this, showing a travel time ratio of 1.5x during these hours. Therefore, focused enforcement on wrong parking at 9:00 IST, especially near the multiple bus stops, is crucial to mitigate morning peak hour congestion.

892830831ffffff.explanation: Zone 892830831ffffff on 3rd Cross Road, Chickpete (Upparpet PS, pincode 560009) scores 51.3/100 on the Congestion Impact Index — SEVERE band. This zone recorded 3,309 parking violations dominated by WRONG PARKING and NO PARKING in the Chickpete commercial wholesale district, where narrow service roads serve high-density goods vehicle loading activity throughout the morning peak. Illegal parking on 3rd Cross Road reduces effective carriage width to a single passing lane, forcing oncoming vehicles to queue at the junction with 3rd Main Road. Gandhi Nagar Bus Stop is 300 metres away and Chickpete market generates significant pedestrian-vehicle conflict during the 09:00 IST peak window. The estimated 14.8 lane-hours blocked daily places this zone in the top-15 congestion impact zones citywide. MapMyIndia shows a 0.99x travel time ratio — essentially free-flowing despite chronic violations, a strong signal that raw violation counts overstate this zone's congestion impact. Enforcement recommendation: WRONG PARKING enforcement at 3rd Cross Road between 08:30 and 11:00 IST, targeting goods vehicle loading violations.
